relevant_files.role: Core compression engine: UltraCompactEngine class with all compaction logic — token estimation, importance scoring, tier detection, graduated eviction, summary generation, circuit breaker support

Pi extension entry point: factory function piUltraCompact(), /ultracompact command handler, session_before_compact hook, model_select/session_start listeners, circuit breaker state, snapshot-rollback, lossy truncation fallback
Type definitions: EvictionLevel enum (4 levels), CompactionTier enum (3 tiers), UltraCompactConfig, CompactionResult, Message, EvictionStats, MicroCompactStats, CircuitBreakerState, Pi API types
Shared utilities (DEAD CODE — not imported by engine.ts): messageContent(), KEYWORD_PATTERNS, extractByPattern(), containsErrorIndicators(), emptyCompactionResult()
Skill documentation: usage guide, supported models, compression rules, output format template
Most comprehensive test file: all 4 eviction levels, tier boundaries, LLM path, history, maxLevel capping
Edge case tests: empty messages, null/undefined content, huge inputs (10K messages, 1MB content), boundary values (NaN, Infinity, negative)
Extension integration tests: factory, command handler, circuit breaker, preemptive trigger, cache-aware, lossy truncation
Fuzz tests: 100 iterations of random message patterns across all engine methods

call_chains.name: Chain A: Automatic Compaction Flow
call_chains.flow: handleBeforeCompact() [index.ts:112] → circuit breaker check → captureModel() → reconfigureEngineForCurrentModel() → preemptive projection (currentTokens + outputHeadroom) → shouldCompact() → snapshot (JSON deep clone) → cache-aware prefix extraction → tier dispatch (MICRO: microCompact() | FULL: generateSummary()) → validate non-empty → success: reset breaker / failure: increment failures, check threshold, lossy truncation

call_chains.name: Chain B: Full Compaction (generateSummary)
call_chains.flow: generateSummary() [engine.ts:452] → preprocessMessages (dedup, pruneToolOutputs, filter empty) → classifyMessages (protect system + importance>0.7 + shouldProtectContent + recentByTokenBudget) → evictGradually (4 levels) → generateSummaryFromRemaining (LLM or heuristic) → generateStructuredSummary (extract goals/decisions/errors/files/next/chat) → metrics + compressionHistory

call_chains.name: Chain C: 3-Tier System
call_chains.flow: determineTier() [engine.ts:359] → ratio = tokens/contextWindow → >=0.9: FULL | >=0.6: MICRO | else: NONE → compact() dispatches: MICRO→microCompact(levels 1-2 only, no LLM) | FULL→generateSummary()

call_chains.name: Chain D: 4-Level Graduated Eviction
call_chains.flow: evictGradually() [engine.ts:841] → check budget (early exit if satisfied) → L1: stripReasoningBlocks (thinking type) → check budget → L2: stripBulkToolOutputs (>100 lines, >5K chars → truncate to 3000) → check budget → L3: stripArtifactToolOutputs (non-error tool results → 1-line summary) → check budget → L4: removeOldCompressibleMessages (protect user/system/importance>0.7, add back newest-first)

call_chains.name: Chain E: Circuit Breaker
call_chains.flow: Module state: compactionFailures, breakerTrippedAtTurn, currentTurn → Entry: currentTurn++ → Check breaker: if tripped and cooldown not expired → return undefined (Pi default) | if expired → reset → On failure: failures++, if >= maxFailures → trip breaker, lossy truncation (system + last 10 msgs, 500 chars each) → Cooldown: 5 turns

call_chains.name: Chain F: Snapshot-Rollback
call_chains.flow: snapshot = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(messagesToCompact)) [index.ts:169] → all compaction operations use snapshot → on success: return result → on failure: original untouched, snapshot used for lossy truncation

data_flows.name: Message Array → Compaction Result
data_flows.steps: Input: Message[] → Snapshot (deep clone) → Preprocess (dedup/prune/filter) → Classify (protect/compress) → Evict (4-level graduated) → Summarize (LLM or heuristic structured) → Output: {summary, tokensBefore, tokensAfter, compressionRatio, readFiles, modifiedFiles}

data_flows.name: Token Estimation Pipeline
data_flows.steps: messageContent(msg) → detect code blocks (``` pairs) → detect whitespace ratio → detect dense text → select ratio (3.5/4.5/6.0) → ceil(length/ratio) → sum

data_flows.name: Importance Scoring
data_flows.steps: messageContent(msg) → 9 keyword patterns (maxWeight) → content multipliers (codeBlock×1.3, filePath×1.2, toolCall×1.15, errorLog×1.25, multiLine×0.9) → floor boost (tool/code → 0.5) → clamp [0,1]

layer3_code_anchors.title: Main Compaction Entry Point + Tier Selection
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: determineTier(): ratio >= 0.9 → FULL, >= 0.6 → MICRO, else NONE. microCompact(): evictGradually with STRIP_BULK_OUTPUT (levels 1-2), target 50% contextWindow. compact(): dispatches MICRO vs FULL.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Token Estimation Algorithm (Content-Aware)
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: 4 ratios: code blocks 3.5, whitespace-heavy 6.0, dense text 3.5, standard prose 4.5. NO LRU CACHE present despite CHANGELOG claims.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Importance Scoring Algorithm
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: 9 keyword patterns (GOAL 1.0 → TODO 0.6), multiplicative content multipliers. MISSING: recency (0.30) and position (0.20) signals from RESEARCH.md. maxWeight starts at 0, multipliers multiply 0 if no keyword match.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Summary Generation (Structured, Single-Pass)
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: LLM path: useLLM + llmSummarize callback, silent catch fallback. Heuristic: generateStructuredSummary with sections Previous Context, Goals, Decisions, Errors, Files, Next, Chat. NO multi-pass, NO quality scoring.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Eviction Level 4 Bug — Budget Not Enforced
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: removeOldCompressibleMessages: initialTokens computed once, never updated as candidates added back. Comment on line 1081 admits missing logic. Budget can be exceeded.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Circuit Breaker Implementation
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: Module-level state, 3-failure threshold, 5-turn cooldown. Lossy truncation: system + last 10 non-system msgs, 500 chars each. __resetModuleState() for test isolation.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Snapshot-Rollback + Cache-Aware Mode
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify()) deep clone. Cache-aware: previous summary kept immutable as prefix, new content appended. MICRO path uses messagesToCompact directly (not snapshot) — inconsistency.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Boundary Condition Handling
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: Empty messages → emptyCompactionResult. Null/undefined content → String(c ?? ''). Non-array → return 0. NaN → false (comparisons). Zero contextWindow → ratio 0 → NONE tier.

layer3_code_anchors.title: shouldCompact — Hardcoded Threshold Bug
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: Gate 1: contextWindow * 0.6 (hardcoded). Gate 2: contextWindow * hardWatermark (default 0.5). hardWatermark 0.5 < 0.6 → Gate 2 fires first, Gate 1 dead. thresholdTokens and preemptiveWatermark NOT consulted.

layer3_code_anchors.title: compressMessage — Code Block Destruction
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: Replaces entire code blocks with 50-char stub of first line. Directly contradicts code protection in importance scoring and shouldProtectContent. Self-defeating for coding agent use case.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Summary Bloat — Previous Summary Prepended Verbatim
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: generateStructuredSummary prepends full previous summary verbatim, re-extracts from combined set. No merge/condense. Summaries monotonically grow across cycles.

layer3_code_anchors.title: Encapsulation Breach — index.ts Accesses Private Config
layer3_code_anchors.snippet: engine['config']?.circuitBreakerCooldown, outputHeadroom, cacheAware, circuitBreakerMaxFailures — bracket notation bypasses TypeScript private modifier.
